summary: Iteration 35 - Testing mouse signature canvas, 4-column grid, inline status change. All backend tests PASS (9/9). Frontend: Signature canvas WORKS with mouse drawing. List view shows 4-column grid with inline status buttons. Planning view below-chart cards show 3 columns (should be 4).

design_issues.screen: Planning view - Reservations du mois section
issues: Cards display in 3-column grid instead of requested 4-column grid. Card widths measure 585px (should be ~465px for 4 columns). Code calculates cw=(width-32-30)/4 but cards render wider.

Signature Canvas (Mouse Drawing).details: Canvas visible with crosshair cursor, mouse drawing works correctly, Clear button clears canvas, Confirm button enables after drawing. Native DOM event listeners bypass React Native Web issues.

List View 4-Column Grid.details: Reservation cards display in 4-column grid layout. Each card has Confi/Activ/Termi/Annul inline status buttons visible and clickable.

Inline Status Change Buttons (List View).details: Found 229 status buttons (Confi, Activ, Termi, Annul). Buttons are clickable and trigger status change API calls.

Planning View Below-Chart Cards.details: Cards show in 3-column layout (measured 585px width per card). Should be 4 columns per requirements. Inline status buttons ARE present on planning cards.

PUT /api/admin/reservations/{id}/status.details: Status change to confirmed/active/completed/cancelled all work. Invalid status correctly rejected with 400.

Contract Sign Endpoint.details: GET /api/contracts/{id} returns contract data. PUT /api/contracts/{id}/sign endpoint exists and accepts signature.

test_classes: TestReservationStatusChange (6 tests) - get reservations, status change to confirmed/active/completed/cancelled, invalid status
TestContractSignature (2 tests) - get contract, sign endpoint exists
TestVehicleSchedule (1 test) - get schedule for Gantt chart

screenshots: list_view_4cols.png - List view showing 4-column grid with inline status buttons
signature_after_draw.png - Signature canvas with mouse-drawn signature visible
planning_grid_detail.png - Planning view showing 3-column below-chart cards
action_items: OPTIONAL: Adjust Planning view 'Reservations du mois' section to show 4 columns instead of 3. Current cards are 585px wide, should be ~465px for 4 columns. Check if gap calculation in line 313 needs adjustment.
critical_code_review_comments: Planning view card width calculation at reservations.tsx:313 uses (width-32-30)/4 but actual rendered width is larger, resulting in 3 columns instead of 4

success_rate.frontend: 90% - Signature works, List 4-col works, Planning shows 3-col (minor)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Signature canvas with native DOM event listeners works perfectly. List view has 4-column grid with inline status buttons working. Planning view below-chart section displays 3 columns instead of 4 - this is a minor layout issue that doesn't affect functionality. All status change APIs work correctly.
